notes: eBay shipping option allowing sellers to offer guaranteed delivery within 3 days

title: Adding shipping options to listings
notes: eBay shipping option allowing sellers to offer guaranteed delivery within 4 days

title: Faster and Local Shopping on eBay Just Got Simpler
notes: eBay shipping program where sellers offer free shipping to buyers, prominently displayed in search results with algorithm preference

title: Faster and Local Shopping on eBay Just Got Simpler
notes: Search filter allowing buyers to show only items with free shipping, consolidated into Shipping and pickup filter in 2025

title: Adding shipping options to listings
notes: Seller option to set minimum purchase amount before free shipping is offered

notes: Standard photo display in eBay listings and search results showing item's main image

title: Saved searches
notes: eBay feature allowing buyers to save searches and receive email or mobile push notifications when new matching listings appear

title: Taxes and import charges
notes: eBay program for collecting and remitting Goods and Services Tax (GST) on sales to Australian buyers

title: Browsing items
notes: Curated editorial collections showcasing themed or seasonal product groupings for buyer discovery

title: Product reviews
notes: Feature allowing buyers to vote product reviews as helpful, surfacing most useful reviews for other shoppers

title: eBay Homepage
notes: Seasonal editorial content featuring curated product recommendations for holiday shopping

title: The advanced listing tool
notes: Advanced listing tool feature allowing sellers to edit item descriptions using HTML code for custom formatting

notes: Visual search feature using AI to search eBay's 1.1 billion listings by uploading photos or using camera, powered by convolutional neural networks

title: Communicating with sellers
notes: Mobile app messaging system allowing buyers and sellers to communicate within the eBay app with conversation threading and AI Assistant

title: Local Pickup Buyer Scan Code
notes: QR code feature in eBay mobile app for sellers to scan at local pickup to verify buyer identity and protect against item-not-received claims

title: Tracking your parcel
notes: Order tracking status indicating package is actively moving through postal carriers or hubs toward destination

title: Seller Hub
notes: Seller Hub section showing expired, ended, or out-of-stock listings with 90-day retention period

title: eBay Launches Item Compare in Search
notes: Feature allowing buyers to select up to 3 items and view side-by-side comparison of specifications in electronics categories

title: The advanced listing tool
notes: Rich text WYSIWYG editor in listing tools for creating formatted item descriptions with text styling and layout options

title: Canceling a purchase
notes: Message displayed when listings are removed, ended, sold out, or seller cancels with 'Out of Stock or Damaged' reason

title: Product reviews
notes: Product review system launched May 2024 allowing buyers to rate and comment on items, shared across all sellers listing same product

title: Item specifics in category listings
notes: Search filters based on category-specific attributes like brand, size, condition allowing precise product browsing

title: Using your watch list
notes: Buyer watchlist feature for saving and tracking items of interest, with automatic removal if eBay removes listing

title: Buy postage
notes: Integration with thermal printers for sellers to print shipping labels purchased through eBay Labels

title: Linked accounts policy
notes: eBay policy governing multiple user IDs and account relationships for the same individual or business

title: Creating and managing listings
notes: Email notification sent to sellers confirming successful item listing publication on eBay

title: Quick Guide to eBay Listing Upgrades
notes: Paid optional listing upgrades including Bold ($2-$4), Subtitle ($1.50-$3.00), and Gallery Plus ($0.35) for increased visibility

title: eBay listing errors and how to resolve them
notes: Error messages preventing listing publication due to payment setup, category issues, policy violations, or duplicate items, shown in Attention Required tab

title: Listing policies
notes: Notification sent to sellers when listings are removed for policy violations, prohibited items, or legal restrictions with explanation and appeal options

title: Live Chat support Isn't appearing as an Option
notes: Customer service chat feature available until November 2024, then removed in favor of callback requests and social media support

title: Searching for items by seller location
notes: Search filter allowing buyers to specify distance radius from zip code for local pickup and nearby items with 'Nearest First' sort option

title: Account security
notes: Security notifications alerting users to new login attempts or account access from unrecognized devices or locations

title: Promoted Listings
notes: Display advertising product within eBay's advertising portfolio including Promoted Listings Standard, Advanced, and Promoted Stores

title: eBay Advanced Search: The Complete Guide
notes: Auto-complete category suggestion feature during listing creation showing dynamically filtered category tree matching search terms

notes: Seller function to initiate contact with buyers through eBay messaging system with optional phone number sharing

title: Seller Hub enhancements
notes: Performance insights on mobile app showing listing views, click-through rate, traffic sources, and business metrics accessible on-the-go

notes: AI-powered background enhancement tool in mobile app offering background removal, solid colors, and AI-generated scenes for listing photos

notes: Fast mobile listing tool with barcode scanning, pre-filled fields, and up to 250 draft capacity for on-the-go selling at stores

notes: HTML templates designed for mobile-responsive listing descriptions displaying properly on smartphones and tablets

notes: eBay guidelines and templates for creating listing descriptions optimized for mobile viewing experience

notes: Link on item pages allowing buyers to browse additional items from same seller or visit seller's eBay Store

notes: Process allowing buyers and sellers to mutually agree to withdraw negative or neutral feedback by both parties

notes: Default search sort option displaying items in chronological order with most recently listed appearing first, customizable through sort menu

notes: Status for auction-format listings without bidding activity, searchable through specialized tools like NoBids.net and ZeroBidFinder for bargain hunting
